channel.title: criticalrole TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from criticalrole

item.title: PSYCH 🐓 🪨 Nearly-petrified demon Tyranny (@Whitney Moore) gets a fantastic fake out as Game Master Brennan Lee Mulligan resumes our adventure after a constitution roll cliffhanger in #CriticalRole Campaign 4, Episode 10 - "Blood for Blood", now available
item.description: PSYCH 🐓 🪨 Nearly-petrified demon Tyranny (@Whitney Moore) gets a fantastic fake out as Game Master Brennan Lee Mulligan resumes our adventure after a constitution roll cliffhanger in #CriticalRole Campaign 4, Episode 10 - "Blood for Blood", now available

item.title: I'VE GOT YOU 🗡 😅 Kattigan Vale's (@Robbie Daymond) healing spell revives Wicander Halovar (@SamRiegel) just in time for him to immediately get speared by a guard in #CriticalRole Campaign 4, Episode 10 - "Blood for Blood", now available on YouTube and @he
item.description: I'VE GOT YOU 🗡 😅 Kattigan Vale's (@Robbie Daymond) healing spell revives Wicander Halovar (@SamRiegel) just in time for him to immediately get speared by a guard in #CriticalRole Campaign 4, Episode 10 - "Blood for Blood", now available on YouTube and @he

item.title: BECAUSE THEY'RE AWESOME 🐎 💕 Our Soldiers' Table adventurers horse around with animal facts in #CriticalRole Campaign 4, Episode 11 - "Make Merry", now available on YouTube and @hellobeacon! @Robbie Daymond @SamRiegel @WillingBlam @LauraBaileyVO @Whi
item.description: BECAUSE THEY'RE AWESOME 🐎 💕 Our Soldiers' Table adventurers horse around with animal facts in #CriticalRole Campaign 4, Episode 11 - "Make Merry", now available on YouTube and @hellobeacon! @Robbie Daymond @SamRiegel @WillingBlam @LauraBaileyVO @Whi

item.title: HE'S A MASK, IT'S INSANE 🎭 👀 Game Master Brennan Lee Mulligan and our Soldiers' Table chat about the enigmatic Bolaire Lathalia (Taliesin Jaffe) during our inaugural installment of Tale Gate! Meet our curiously arcane curator, along with our Seekers' Tabl

item.title: A NOTEWORTHY NOTABLE 📝 🎨 Check out some stunning fan art with the one and only Whitney Moore as she shares our first #NoteworthyNotables featured piece by www.tumblr.com/zhellers! Looking for a chance to have your art shared on our LIVE talkback show, Tal

item.title: I'M A HERO OF THE PEOPLE 🗣 🗣 🗣 Game Master Brennan Lee Mulligan narcs on Taliesin Jaffe as the cast try to get him to break before the cameras roll on #CriticalRole Campaign 4, Episode 11 - "Make Merry", now available on YouTube and @hellobeacon! #dnd #

item.title: IT IS NOT TO BE SCARED 🥹 🪶 Game Master Brennan Lee Mulligan embodies a truly memorable bird keeper as our Seekers' Table set out in search of answers in #CriticalRole Campaign 4, Episode 13 - "Seeking Sanctuary", now available on @hellobeacon and YouTube
item.description: IT IS NOT TO BE SCARED 🥹 🪶 Game Master Brennan Lee Mulligan embodies a truly memorable bird keeper as our Seekers' Table set out in search of answers in #CriticalRole Campaign 4, Episode 13 - "Seeking Sanctuary", now available on @hellobeacon and YouTube

item.title: VERY DIRECT 🍷😅 Our Seekers' Table navigate the unusual ways of the Schneffenkeep as Game Master Brennan Lee Mulligan weaves together a tale of Castle Klippenblicke in #CriticalRole Campaign 4, Episode 13 - "Seeking Sanctuary", now available on @hellobeac

item.title: LET'S CALL OUR REPS TOGETHER 📱 Hey, Critters! Calling your representatives may sound intimidating, but it doesn't have to be! We used 5 Calls to contact ours, and so can you! The site and app make the process fast, easy, and effective: providing important

item.title: HE DID SOMETHING TO YOU 🎲 💀 Occtis (@🦇Alexander Ward🦇) rolls another Natural 20 after a night of terrible casts of the dice for Vaelus (@Smashley Johnson), something that could only be the product of Tachonis style necromancy.... #CriticalRole Campaign

item.title: I JUST TOLD YOU A STORY ABOUT THAT 🫳💰 Fearne Calloway (@Smashley Johnson) can't help herself as her pickpocketing powers are introduced to Bells Hells in the very first episode of #CriticalRole Campaign 3, " The Draw of Destiny"! Begin your Campaign 3 ad

item.title: 11 YEARS AND THE ADVENTURE HAS JUST BEGUN 🎲 💕 It's our 11th anniversary! After over a decade of legendary dice rolls, epic tales, and laughter around the table, we can't wait to show you what's coming next from #CriticalRole! Thank you, Critters, for the
item.description: 11 YEARS AND THE ADVENTURE HAS JUST BEGUN 🎲 💕 It's our 11th anniversary! After over a decade of legendary dice rolls, epic tales, and laughter around the table, we can't wait to show you what's coming next from #CriticalRole! Thank you, Critters, for the

item.title: OOOOOHHHHHH 👀😳 Things get tense at the table for Occtis Tachonis (@🦇Alexander Ward🦇) as the moment becomes too much for Vaelus (@Smashley Johnson) in #CriticalRole Campaign 4, Episode 18 - "Vindicta & Vale", available now on YouTube and @hellobeacon! @Ma

item.title: ADVENTURE WITH US LIVE IN 2026 🗺️ 🎲 Our enchanted Echoes of Exandria LIVE Show Tour is taking all the magic and chaos of #CriticalRole on the road next year, bringing the realms into reality (did someone say rollies in a CASTLE?) for a few dazzling nights
item.description: ADVENTURE WITH US LIVE IN 2026 🗺️ 🎲 Our enchanted Echoes of Exandria LIVE Show Tour is taking all the magic and chaos of #CriticalRole on the road next year, bringing the realms into reality (did someone say rollies in a CASTLE?) for a few dazzling nights

item.title: WHAT'S YOUR CHARACTER'S VIBE? 4️⃣ 👀 The cast of #CriticalRole Campaign 4 share a few hints about their Aramán adventurers after their art reveal! Our epic tale, led by Game Master Brennan Lee Mulligan, begins this October 2nd! LEARN MORE ABOUT C4 ⬇️ http:
item.description: WHAT'S YOUR CHARACTER'S VIBE? 4️⃣ 👀 The cast of #CriticalRole Campaign 4 share a few hints about their Aramán adventurers after their art reveal! Our epic tale, led by Game Master Brennan Lee Mulligan, begins this October 2nd! LEARN MORE ABOUT C4 ⬇️ http:

item.title: CAN A WORLD THIS BROKEN BE SAVED BY HEROES YET MORE BROKEN STILL? 🧭 🎲 As our Soldiers' Table reels from their battle of blood and stone, our tale in Aramán turns to our Seekers as they hurtle eastward in search of the Golden Orchard's fate... See their sa
item.description: CAN A WORLD THIS BROKEN BE SAVED BY HEROES YET MORE BROKEN STILL? 🧭 🎲 As our Soldiers' Table reels from their battle of blood and stone, our tale in Aramán turns to our Seekers as they hurtle eastward in search of the Golden Orchard's fate... See their sa
